# Cancelling a Test Invite

To cancel a test invite for a candidate in HackerRank Screen, navigate to the
Tests tab, open the test, locate the candidate in the invited list, and click
the cancel invite action. Cancelling the invite revokes the candidate's access
immediately and removes the test attempt from their queue.
